narrative:
Lake 21 (precinct in Stark County) has 813 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.3 percentage points.
